name: table-naming-strategy
question: How to convert model names to table names?
decision: 1:1 mapping with model name, no pluralization. Organization → Organization table (not organizations). Avoids pluralization edge cases (Person→People, Category→Categories). Matches resolved design from vault documentation (02-discovery-entrypoint.md decision #1).
rationale: Simplicity and consistency. Schema defines Organization, table is Organization. Pluralization rules are complex and language-specific. Direct mapping is predictable.
